auth.instructions:
1. Log in to your Matrix account (e.g., via Element at https://app.element.io)
2. Go to Settings > Help & About > Advanced
3. Copy your Access Token
4. If using a custom homeserver, set MATRIX_HOMESERVER env var
   (e.g., MATRIX_HOMESERVER=https://matrix.example.com)
   Default: https://matrix-client.matrix.org
5. Store your homeserver URL in workspace at matrix/homeserver
   (just the base URL, e.g., https://matrix-client.matrix.org)
